title: Omphalodaphne citriodora
intro: Omphalodaphne citriodora, also known as the citron-scented Omphalodaphne, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Southeast Asia. The health benefits of Omphalodaphne citriodora include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include diterpenoids, flavonoids, and sesquiterpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Omphalodaphne citriodora include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of various diseases.
